from sqlalchemy import text
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session


_ACTIVE_USER_BASE = (
    "FROM users u "
    "JOIN memberships m ON u.id = m.user_id "
    "WHERE m.org_id = :org_id AND u.is_active = TRUE "
    "AND u.deleted_at IS NULL"
)


def get_active_users(db: Session, org_id: int):
    query = text(f"SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email {_ACTIVE_USER_BASE} ORDER BY u.name")
    return db.execute(query, {"org_id": org_id}).fetchall()


def get_active_users_with_roles(db: Session, org_id: int, role: str):
    query = text(
        f"SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email {_ACTIVE_USER_BASE} "
        "AND m.role = :role ORDER BY u.name"
    )
    return db.execute(query, {"org_id": org_id, "role": role}).fetchall()


def count_active_users(db: Session, org_id: int):
    query = text(f"SELECT COUNT(*) {_ACTIVE_USER_BASE}")
    return db.execute(query, {"org_id": org_id}).scalar()
